markdown_projection.note: JSON contract is authority per the operator no-.md directive (KERNEL stub convention).

lifecycle.spec_status: Anchored to Pillar 4 (rich-text/Notion-class) + Pillar 7 (Loom views). No new spec authority created at stub time; refinement decides enrichment.

draft_scope.intent: Houses deferred Notion-class scope that exceeds the WP-KERNEL-012 React-parity bar: a user-editable template engine (template folder + {{date}}/variable substitution + template picker) building on the two hardcoded WP-012 MT-016 snippets; typed page properties (select / multi-select / date / number / checkbox / status) beyond the WP-012 title/tags model; and richer database views (relations / rollups) beyond the WP-012 MT-027 table/Kanban/calendar baseline. Keeps WP-012 anchored to proven React parity while parking forward Notion scope so it is not silently dropped.
draft_scope.scope_sketch: IN (subject to refinement): user-editable template engine; typed page properties; database relations/rollups; advanced view config. OUT: anything already delivered by WP-012 (basic tags, table/Kanban/calendar views, daily notes, snippets); backend rewrite (gaps are typed blockers); SQLite (PostgreSQL/EventLedger only). Native Rust under src/frontend/**, hosted in the WP-011 shell, reusing handshake_core knowledge-document + Loom view APIs.
key_open_questions: Does the handshake_core knowledge document schema support arbitrary typed properties, or is this a backend-gap typed blocker (WP-012 MT-017 flags that even flat string tags may lack a backend field)?
Should templates be stored as knowledge documents in a template folder or as a distinct backend entity?
Do database relations/rollups require new backend query support or can they ride existing Loom view_def execution?
draft_scope.acceptance_criteria: STUB-LEVEL ONLY. Full AC list deferred to refinement. ACTIVATION-AC: refinement resolves the key_open_questions (backend property support, template storage model, relations/rollups query path), derives SPEC_ANCHOR/DONE_MEANS, obtains operator signature, and pre-creates the full-detail MT set before execution.

build_order.sequencing_note: Builds on the native rich-text/knowledge editor delivered by WP-012. Activate after WP-012 lands.

spec_trace.roadmap_pointer: Forward Notion-class editor scope discovered during WP-012 activation; parked to avoid scope creep into the WP-012 React-parity rebuild.

assumptions_to_attack: A stub is planning metadata, not execution authority.
Typed properties / relations may require backend support absent today (treat as typed blocker, not in-WP backend edit).
minimum_controls: Keep execution_authority=NON_EXECUTION_STUB until a signed official packet exists.
Refinement must close the key_open_questions before MT authoring.
Require operator signature before packet creation and worktree preparation.
